error_message: failed to resolve: use of unresolved module or unlinked crate `gorilla_paper_encode`
error_snippet:
|
1 | use gorilla_paper_encode::gorilla::{FloatEncoder, FloatDecoder, BitWriter, BitReader};
  |     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ use of unresolved module or unlinked crate `gorilla_paper_encode`
  |
  = help: if you wanted to use a crate named `gorilla_paper_encode`, use `cargo add gorilla_paper_encode` to add it to your `Cargo.toml`

For more information about this error, try `rustc --explain E0433`.
